title: ヴィクトリアマイルの後に・新たな輝き

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has a great race, and the audience goes
into a frenzy of excitement!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is it...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I get it now... This is what I'm after...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... I wanna get my hands on it... and show it
off...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I've finally got that post-Derby feel back...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I did. The next level of coolness.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What I want next is a super dash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A dash. Vodka's answer is surprisingly specific.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Picture me right on the homestretch, blowing by
dozens of other Umamusume, regardless of their
position.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: If only I had the ability to do that...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I felt it while I was runnin' today. Nobody was
thinkin' about what came before or after.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We threw ourselves into the last stretch, and right
then all we lived for was to be the fastest and
break out ahead.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Runnin' against everyone full force like that felt
so good.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I knew right then that, no matter what, I don't
want to lose in that final showdown of speed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It was just me as I am—pure speed, nothing else.
It was just like...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That drag race from that summer. I put everything
on the line for those ten short seconds of speed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In just a split second, you can flip the whole race.
That's the kinda explosive power I want!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinkin' that's what cool is. What do you think,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah, I see what you mean.
Yeah, I see what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being able to run the final three furlongs faster
than anyone else would certainly be a fearsome
weapon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience would go crazy. It'd be like hitting a
home run, or winning by KO in boxing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I wanna master this. No, I gotta master this. So, where are we goin' next, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What race'll help me achieve the potential I
discovered today?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Another mile, huh? I'm guessin' that'll test my
reflexes better than the 2,200-meter Takarazuka
Kinen in the spring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the way to go if Vodka's serious about
getting the skills she's talking about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A normal Umamusume would never brush off the
Grand Prix like an afterthought, but considering
we're talking about Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's decided then. We're goin' to the Yasuda
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's where I'll perfect it—my super cool,
win-the-race-in-a-flash maneuver!
